modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Fax machine not receiving any faxes.

full_description_text: The fax machine is not getting faxes. The user said it hasn't received anything. They want someone to check it out. Please send help to look at the machine.
short_description: Fax machine not receiving any faxes.
description: The fax machine is not getting faxes. The user said it hasn't received anything. They want someone to check it out. Please send help to look at the machine.
